emergency_definition: No water pressure to suppression lines

BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Bright Shield Fire Protection. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to route your call to our team. Please hold for just a moment.
We did not reach a dispatcher yet, but we are logging your request now.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
Thank you for calling Bright Shield Fire Protection. Have a great day.

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Bright Shield Fire Protection. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the reason for your call?
Is this an emergency, such as an active fire alarm trouble, sprinkler burst, or no water pressure to suppression lines?
I'm going to transfer you to our on-call technician. Can you please provide a brief description of the issue?
We did not reach a dispatcher yet, but we are logging your request now. Someone will call you back as soon as possible.
I'm going to collect some information from you, and we will address your issue on the next business day.
Thank you for calling Bright Shield Fire Protection. We will be in touch with you soon.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We did not reach a dispatcher yet, but we are logging your request now.

tool_invocation_note: No outbound SMS, no calendar writes from the agent. Integration with Housecall Pro.
